root_cause: Re-encryption batch job failed on November 8 due to disk space exhaustion on re-encryption worker. Disk expanded November 10. Batch restarted but encountered deadlock on high-traffic tables. Required off-hours maintenance window scheduled for November 15. Final re-encryption completed November 17.
corrective_action: 1. Added disk space monitoring alerts for re-encryption workers. 2. Pre-allocated additional disk before future rotations. 3. Documented off-hours maintenance window requirement for high-traffic table re-encryption.
